results.description:
Welcome to RadarOmega, the next-generation weather app that keeps you up to date with live, local radar, real-time severe weather alerts and more. Our professional high-resolution weather data app operates in the US, Canada, Germany, Australia and South Korea. 

This is more than just weather radar. RadarOmega provides unique data solutions for all types of weather data, customized to your needs and weather alert preferences. From severe weather to local radar - RadarOmega is the solution for full weather coverage.

RadarOmega created an exclusive network of weather stations featuring live video and sensor data called cyclonePORT. RadarOmega and cyclonePORT work closely with universities, emergency managers, broadcast meteorologists, and more to provide solutions for relaying extreme weather information when life-threatening weather situations are imminent, and immediate alerts are needed.

Get push notifications for severe, winter, tropical weather alerts and more. Users can subscribe to different packages to access additional data on satellites, MRMS, and models. Explore Alpha, Beta, or Gamma subscriptions to find the data that best suits you and your weather report preferences from winter to hurricane season. 

Download today to start viewing your customizable weather alerts.

RADAR OMEGA APP FEATURES:

DAILY & EXTREME WEATHER DATA COLLECTED
- High-resolution radar data: Level 2 and 3, Dual Pol
- MRMS: Reflectivity, hail, rotation tracks, precipitation, etc
- Satellite: Visible, infrared, water vapor
- Models: HRRR, NAM3KM, NAM12KM, RAP, GFS, ECMWF
- NDFD: Temps, wind speeds, wind gusts, snow totals for extreme weather

BASE APPLICATION FEATURES
- High-resolution single site radar data
- Weather outlooks and monitoring for excessive rainfall, fire weather and more
- Extreme weather alerts for snow, rain, flash floods, tornadoes, hurricanes, etc. with flash animation & in-app sound alerts
- Real-time NWS storm based warnings
- Radar and map type customization tools
-11 Different Map Type Presets
- Buoy data & tidal forecast charts
- and more

GAMMA SUBSCRIPTION PACKAGE
- Hi-Res Satellite Data
- National Digital Forecast Database
- Access to Project MesoVort
- 75 Frames of Data
- Dual View Radar with 30 Frames
- Smoothing for Radar/Satellite
- 30 Day Radar History
- 6 Month Storm Report Archive
- 3D Radar / Satellite
- Upload 3 Custom Color Tables
- 30 Custom Locations with Icon Upload & 2 Custom Location Lists

BETA SUBSCRIPTION PACKAGE
*Everything in Gamma PLUS*
- MRMS Data
- 150 Frames of Data
- Dual View Radar/Satellite with 50 Frames
- Smoothing for MRMS
- 90 Day Radar History
- 5 Year Storm Report Archive
- 3D MRMS
- Upload 8 Custom Color Tables
- 75 Custom Locations with Icon Upload & 5 Custom Location Lists

ALPHA SUBSCRIPTION PACKAGE
*Everything in Beta PLUS*
- Volumetric Radar
- Model Data with Contours for HRRR, NAM3KM, NAM12KM, RAP, GFS, ECMWF, HWRF, & HMON
- 250 Frames of Data
- Dual View Radar/Satellite with 100 Frames
- Quad View Radar/Satellite on iPad & Desktop with 50 Frames
- Smoothing for Models
- 90 Day Radar History
- 10 Year Storm Report Archive
- Upload 30 Custom Color Tables
- 150 Custom Locations with Icon Upload & 10 Custom Location Lists
- Lightning Monitoring: 1 Site Lightning Monitoring with Custom Range Zones

Additional Add-Ons
- Rapid Sweep

Start your subscription today to start tracking local radars, daily temps, precipitation, and extreme weather!

Subscriptions are maintained through the iOS App Store. We will work with our customers; however, refunds must be done through the iOS App Store. Please be sure to reach out to our support team if you have any problems, questions, or concerns.

For Support - You can create a ticket, and we will resolve it as soon as possible:
https://radaromegawx.supportbee.io/portal/sign_in

See our Terms of Service below: https://www.radaromega.com/terms.php
